SEQUENCE.COMMENT: registerErrorSNE - register an error in the framework and create a ServiceNow ticket if necessary (duplicate tickets will be supressed)
inputs: (required)
errorSource - discrete known identifier indicating the source of the error (ie, CSFW, SAP, APP1, etc) informational only
errorNumber - a brief, consistent and predictable text value used to uniquely identify a given error message
errorMessage - the full text of the error - can be multiline
inputs: (optional)
errorMessageBrief - brief, one-line description of error - default: first 250 characters of errorMessage
ticketPriority - 2 or 3 but not value-checked
ticketQueue - ticket queue within SDM where the ticket is to be routed
ticketArea - from among over 2300 in the SDM system - default: software/webmethods
closingSymptomCode - SDM only
closingRootCauseCode - SDM only
closingResolutionCode - SDM only
externalTicketNumber - unused, obsolete
output:
ticketNumber- the ticket number generated in SN for this error
ticketStatusMessage - status message of the ticket, either Normal successful completion, or FE0540-FE0544 error
input parameter handling

BRANCH.COMMENT: fail if required inputs not supplied

SEQUENCE.NAME: errorSource=='' || errorSource==$null || errorNumber=='' || errorNumber==$null || errorMessage=='' || errorMessage==$null

MAP.COMMENT: append SNE to the errorNumber to accommodate two possible insert statements..SN and SDM

BRANCH.COMMENT: supply a default if errorMessageBrief not supplied - first 250 characters of errorMessage

MAP.COMMENT: convert input to known internal SN (ticket*IID) identifiers

INVOKE.COMMENT: look for the ticketQueue in hard-coded list of assignment groups
Supplied ticket queue %ticketQueue% not valid within SN - changing to Connectivity Solutions - Engineering Support

Values.value: Supplied ticket queue %ticketQueue% not valid within SN - changing to Connectivity Solutions - Engineering Support

INVOKE.COMMENT: in errorMessage, replace any embedded carriage return/linefeed/tab with a space
in errorMessageBrief, replace any embedded carriage return/linefeed/tab with a space
in errorMessage, replace any explicit \n with an html CRLF (*u000D*u000A)
in errorMessageBrief, replace any explicit \n with a space
in errorMessage, replace any explicit \t with an html TAB (*u0009)
in errorMessageBrief, replace any explicit \t with a space
in errorMessage, replace any remaining explicit \ with a ?
in errorMessageBrief, replace any remaining \ with a ?
finally in errorMessage, replace any *u000 with \u000
finally in errorMessageBrief, replace any *u000 with \u000

MAP.COMMENT: drop the things that don't apply in SN

Values.value: Converted input: errorSource=%errorSource% errorNumber=%errorNumber% errorMessageBrief=%errorMessageBrief% errorMessage=%errorMessage% ticketPriority=%ticketPriority% [ ticketUrgencyIID=%ticketUrgencyIID% ticketImpactIID=%ticketImpactIID% ] ticketQueue=%ticketQueue% ticketArea=%ticketArea% [ ticketCategoryIID=%ticketCategoryIID% ticketSubcategoryIID=%ticketSubcategoryIID% ]

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT * FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG WHERE ERROR_NUM='%errorNumber%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID='0'

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TFW_ERROR_LOG WHERE ERROR_NUM='%errorNumber%' AND ERROR_NUM_GUID='0'

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: this specific error has not been seen before, so create a SN ticket - will add a 0 record below
service to determine to send tickets to GCF queues

MAP.COMMENT: replace MES to Plant for commonality

INVOKE.COMMENT: Found GCF Plant code in description

Values.value: Found GCF Plant code in description

BRANCH.COMMENT: check for specific queue names and change them

MAP.NAME: ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - DL - P&CP' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - DL - CPB'|| ticketQueue=='Supply Chain - DL - IPG Mill'
ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - OM - P&CP' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - OM - IPG Mill' || ticketQueue=='Supply Chain - P&S - P&CP'|| ticketQueue == 'Supply Chain - P&S - IPG Mill'
ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - Ecom - Mill' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - P&S - CPB'
ticketQueue== 'GSC-SysGen ***NotForITCSUse***' || ticketQueue== 'SC Source-**NotForITCSUse**' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - MP - Mill'|| ticketQueue=='GSC-Sysgen-dl**NotForITCSUse**'
ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - DL - P&CP' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - DL - CPB'|| ticketQueue=='Supply Chain - DL - IPG Mill'
ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - OM - P&CP' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - OM - IPG Mill' || ticketQueue=='Supply Chain - P&S - P&CP'|| ticketQueue == 'Supply Chain - P&S - IPG Mill'
ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - Ecom - Mill' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - P&S - CPB'
ticketQueue== 'GSC-SysGen ***NotForITCSUse***' || ticketQueue== 'SC Source-**NotForITCSUse**' || ticketQueue== 'Supply Chain - MP - Mill'|| ticketQueue=='GSC-Sysgen-dl**NotForITCSUse**'

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: do nothing

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0544 General failure creating SN ticket - http=%header/status% msg=%header/statusMessage%

Values.value: FE0544 General failure creating SDM ticket - http=%header/status% msg=%header/statusMessage%

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: this specific error has been seen before, so don't create a new SN ticket - will add a guid record below

INVOKE.COMMENT: this is a recurrence of SN ticket %snTicketnumber%, handle:%snTicketnumberHandle%

Values.value: this is a recurrence of SN ticket %snTicketnumber%, handle:%snTicketnumberHandle%

MAP.COMMENT: ticketStatusMessage = Recurrence of this error guidsql=RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())

INVOKE.COMMENT: sCurtime = yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSZ in UTC ie 2019-04-01 7:57:23.287+000

MAP.COMMENT: INSERT INTO TFW_ERROR_LOG (errorNumber, guidsql, sCurtime, clusterName, host, port, errorSource, errorMessageBrief)

Values.value: INSERT INTO TFW_ERROR_LOG (ERROR_NUM, ERROR_NUM_GUID, ENTRY_DATE, ENTRY_CLUSTER, ENTRY_HOST, ENTRY_PORT, ENTRY_SOURCE, BRIEF_MESSAGE, USD_TICKET_NUMBER, USD_TICKET_HANDLE, USD_KNOWN_COUNT) VALUES ('%errorNumber%', %guidsql%, '%sCurtime%','%clusterName%', '%host%', '%port%', '%errorSource%', '%errorMessageBrief%', '%snTicketnumber%', '%snTicketnumberHandle%', '')

INVOKE.COMMENT: remove the trailing SNE from the errorNumber that we appended up at the top
